turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi evelyn , how is Evelyn ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Evelyn is good , how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is good . it's good to see Evelyn .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good to see the doctor too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so the doctor knows the nurse told Evelyn a little bit about dax . the doctor is gon na tell dax about Evelyn , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so evelyn is a 56-year-old female with a past medical history significant for coronary artery disease , prior carpal tunnel release , and a herniated disc who presents for Evelyn's annual exam . so evelyn it's been a little while since the doctor has seen Evelyn , how has Evelyn been doing over the last year ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Evelyn has been doing okay , um , everything , um , with Evelyn's herniated disc in Evelyn's back has been doing really well . Evelyn has n't had any , um , back pain , or any , um , limitations in movement , so Evelyn's herniated disc in Evelyn's back has been doing well .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , yeah , the doctor knows that the doctor has done a steroid injection for Evelyn's herniated disc in Evelyn's back , uh , a couple of month- , uh , several months ago , so Evelyn's herniated disc in Evelyn's back is- that's doing well ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , Evelyn's herniated disc in Evelyn's back is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , the doctor is glad to hear that . and then , how about Evelyn's carpal tunnel issues , Evelyn had Evelyn's carpal tunnel issues fixed a couple of years ago , so is Evelyn having any recurrent issues , or is Evelyn good , is Evelyn back to work ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Evelyn is back to work . Evelyn has n't had any issues , and Evelyn has had full range of motion , and Evelyn's carpal tunnel issues- Evelyn's carpal tunnel issues feels really good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , so no numbing and tingling in Evelyn's hands ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , that's good . and then , the doctor knows that Evelyn has had , uh , prior stenting in the past for Evelyn's- for Evelyn's heart , and Evelyn's heart vessels .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how is Evelyn doing from the standpoint of Evelyn's prior stenting for Evelyn's heart and Evelyn's heart vessels ? has Evelyn had any chest pain , shortness of breath , nausea or vomiting ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: over the last month Evelyn has been having a bit of chest pain , but Evelyn has n't had any of the other symptoms the doctor mentioned .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , does the chest pain happen when Evelyn walks ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , the chest pain does .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and does the chest pain- does the chest pain go away if Evelyn- if Evelyn rests ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , the chest pain does actually .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . does Evelyn ever get the chest pain just sitting there at rest ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no Evelyn do n't .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . okay , and- and can Evelyn describe the chest pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the chest pain is like a burn .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the chest pain the chest pain just feels like the chest pain is burning , um , nothing terribly concerning , not enough to send Evelyn to the er , but Evelyn do notice the chest pain .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and where exactly is the chest pain located in Evelyn's chest ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: just , um , right in the middle ...

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: right here .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and how often is Evelyn getting the chest pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , probably about three- three times a week .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . well the doctor is glad that Evelyn talked about the chest pain with the doctor today , um , the doctor knows the nurse did a review of systems sheet with Evelyn , and , you know , Evelyn is obviously endorsing this- this chest pressure . um , has Evelyn had any other symptoms , the doctor knows the- the other ones that Evelyn have n't had , but any lower extremity edema , or muscle aches , or fever chills ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , nothing like that , but Evelyn have had a little bit of congestion , um , just from allergies , because of the pollen .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so Evelyn is endorsing some nasal congestion ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right , well let's go ahead and the doctor and Evelyn will do a physical exam , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon ? show the doctor the vital signs . so here Evelyn's vital signs look really good , the doctor is- the doctor is happy to see that Evelyn's blood pressure is under- under good control , and Evelyn's oxygenation is fine , so the doctor is just gon na take a listen to Evelyn's heart and lungs , and the doctor will let Evelyn know if the doctor finds anything , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , so in physical exam Evelyn's heart has a slight three out of six systolic ejection murmur , which the doctor has heard before . Evelyn's lungs are nice and clear , uh , the doctor do n't appreciate any carotid bruits , and- and Evelyn have no lower extremity edema , Evelyn have healed , uh , surgical scars on Evelyn's- on Evelyn's , uh , right wrist . um , so let's go ahead , the doctor wan na look at some of Evelyn's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , show the doctor the echocardiogram ? so this is the echocardiogram from last year , you know , Evelyn did have a slightly low pumping function of Evelyn's heart at 45 % , but , uh , the doctor- , you know , the doctor suspected that the slightly low pumping function of Evelyn's heart will improve over time , and Evelyn did have some slight , what the doctor call , mitral regurgitation , that's just a leaky heart valve , and that's that murmur that the doctor heard . hey dragon , show the doctor the ecg ? and here , you know , in reviewing Evelyn's results of Evelyn's e- ecg , you know , the ecg looks stable , the ecg just kinda reflects Evelyn's prior coronary artery disease . there's no new changes , which is good , so let's talk a little bit about the doctor's assessment and plan for Evelyn . so , from Evelyn's first problem , you know , Evelyn's carpal tunnel release , the doctor do n't think that the doctor need to anything further about Evelyn's carpal tunnel release , 'cause Evelyn seem to be doing really well , Evelyn is back at work , if Evelyn have any recurring symptoms , just let the doctor know , and the doctor and Evelyn can take Evelyn's carpal tunnel release from there . for Evelyn's next problem , Evelyn's herniated disc , Evelyn's herniated disc also sounds like Evelyn's doing really well , the doctor do n't think that the doctor need to refer Evelyn for any further steroid injection , or physical therapy at this time . so , if Evelyn have recurrent symptoms , the doctor want Evelyn to let the doctor know . and finally , Evelyn's last problem , the most concerning problem to the doctor is Evelyn's known coronary artery disease , and this recurrent chest pain Evelyn have . so , the doctor wan na go ahead and continue Evelyn on Evelyn's asprin , and Evelyn's toprol , okay ? the doctor wan na go ahead and order a stress test for Evelyn to see if Evelyn have more blockages that could be causing this chest discomfort , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and the doctor is gon na go ahead and get a lipid panel and , uh , start Evelyn on crestor 20 mg , once a day , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , order a cardiac stress test . does Evelyn have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , that's it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . hey dragon , finalize the note . so , it was good to see Evelyn , the nurse will come in , the nurse'll help Evelyn get Evelyn scheduled for all of those things , and the doctor will be in touch , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: take care .
